title: polychilos lamelligera
intro: Polychilos lamelligera, also known as the Polychilos tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where its leaves and stems are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Polychilos lamelligera include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are typically administered to patients in traditional medicine practices.
